testcase.name: testMaxPasswordLength

failure.message: expected [Password too long.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Password too long.] but found [Email ili lozinka nisu u redu.] at tests.LoginTest.testMaxPasswordLength(LoginTest.java:180) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:842) ... Removed 24 stack frames

testcase.name: testValidLogin

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[@class='sc-79pcpx-0 ieekjL']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
